code: import React from"react";import{useCurrency}from"../theme/useCurrency";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ExpenseList=_ref=>{let{expenses=[],onDeleteExpense}=_ref;const{currency}=useCurrency();if(expenses.length===0){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"expense-list",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{style:{fontSize:'1.1rem',marginBottom:'1rem',color:'var(--text-primary)'},children:"Expenses"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:'var(--text-muted)',fontSize:'0.875rem'},children:"No expenses added yet."})]});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"expense-list",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{style:{fontSize:'1.1rem',marginBottom:'1rem',color:'var(--text-primary)'},children:"Expenses"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"transaction-list",children:expenses.map(exp=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"transaction-category",children:exp.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"transaction-desc",children:"Expense"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'1rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"transaction-amount expense",children:["-",currency,exp.amount]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"delete-btn",onClick:()=>onDeleteExpense&&onDeleteExpense(exp.id),children:"\u2715"})]})]},exp.id))})]});};export default ExpenseList;
